citations: [Chronic exercise preserves lean muscle mass in masters athletes.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22030953/)
[HAMIL-QA: Hierarchical Approach to Multiple Instance Learning for Atrial LGE MRI Quality Assessment.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41473352/)
[An independent Monte Carlo-based IMRT QA tool for a 0.35 T MRI-guided linear accelerator.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/36325743/)
[MR-OCTAVIUS 4D with 1500 MR and 1600 MR arrays is suitable for plan QA in a 1.5 T MRI-linac.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39053500/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 22030953. 2011/09/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To develop an independent log file-based intensity-modulated radiation 
therapy (IMRT) quality assurance (QA) tool for the 0.35 T magnetic 
resonance-li
evidence.source_title: Chronic exercise preserves lean muscle mass in masters athletes.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 22030953. 2011/09/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To develop an independent log file-based intensity-modulated radiation 
therapy (IMRT) quality assurance (QA) tool for the 0.35 T magnetic 
resonance-linac (MR-linac) and investigate the ability of various IMRT plan 
complexity metrics to predict the QA results. Complexity metrics related to 
tissue heterogeneity were also introduced.
METHODS: The tool for particle simulation (TOPAS) Monte Carlo code was utilized 
with a previously validated linac
evidence.search_query: MRI QA frequency recommendations radiation oncology AAPM ASTRO guidelines
